description: Dropbox is a cloud storage and collaboration service for storing, sharing, and managing files and folders. It also offers business administration features through the Dropbox Business platform and AI-connected access through Dropbox MCP endpoints.
summary: Dropbox exposes a documented HTTP API for user and business/team operations, two OAuth-protected remote MCP servers, and Dropbox Drop-ins web components (Chooser/Saver/Embedder) initialized with an app key.
